english: Turn Body and Left Heel Kick
visual: Pivots on the supporting leg, arms cross at the chest, then extends the left leg forward heel-first as the arms open wide.
motion_description: The motion begins by shifting weight entirely to the right leg and executing a 180-degree clockwise pivot as the left foot sweeps behind. Following the rotation, the arms circle downward and cross in front of the upper chest while the left knee lifts upward. With a slow, continuous flow, the left leg extends straight forward at hip height, pushing through the heel, as the arms simultaneously sweep apart to opposite sides at shoulder level.
